positive: A stylized and highly detailed illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The central focus is a massive, glowing bioluminescent tree with intricate root systems wrapping around floating, crystalline islands. Gentle nebula clouds drift through the canopy, illuminated by a soft, ethereal crescent moon and scattered stars. The overall composition should be symmetrical and highly contrasted, featuring deep midnight blues, vibrant magenta accents, and glowing teal highlights. Minimalist yet complex, designed for a seamless circular print repeat or a central apparel graphic. Clean silhouette, Art Nouveau influence with modern graphic clarity. Highly detailed vector style, studio lighting, 8k, perfect print quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, disfigured, amateur, copyright, trademark, cartoonish, photo-realistic
